title: T-050 — UI: TEC-050 Cost History panel + TEC-051 Cost Edit/Recompute modal
prompt:
# T-050 — UI: TEC-050 Cost History panel + TEC-051 Cost Edit/Recompute modal

PRD: docs/prd/03-TECHNICAL-PRD.md §11.5 TEC-050, §11.5 TEC-051, §11A
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:761-820` (cost_history_screen); `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:518-537` (cost_rollup_recompute_modal)

## Goal
Cost history timeline + recompute modal with V-TEC-53 high-variance approver field.

Timeline shows source badges (manual/d365_sync/supplier_update/variance_roll). Recompute modal triggers POST /cost — for >20% deltas the modal reveals an Approver picker (Owner role).

## Implementation contract
See `## Goal` + scope_files + acceptance_criteria below; preserve prototype parity, server-action semantics, RLS/org-scoping, and module red-lines listed in `## Risk red lines`.

## Files
- app/(app)/technical/items/[item_code]/_tabs/cost-tab.tsx [create]
- app/(app)/technical/items/[item_code]/_components/cost-edit-modal.tsx [create]
- tests/ui/tec-050-cost.test.tsx [create]

## Out of scope
- D365 cost diff (T-068 docs gap)

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the cost panel renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:761-820 and prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:518-537, then timeline structure, source badges, and modal layout match — structural + visual + interaction parity verified by RTL.
2. Given cost delta exceeds 20%, when modal opens, then Approver picker is required.
3. Given user lacks technical.cost.edit, when on tab, then Edit button is hidden.
4. UI closeout includes screenshot/artifact evidence and Playwright trace/artifacts where applicable per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright is unavailable, document the blocker and provide RTL/snapshot fallback evidence.

## Test strategy
- RED tests for parity + 20% threshold + RBAC.
- Run: pnpm vitest run tests/ui/tec-050-cost.test.tsx
- For UI parity, capture screenshots/artifacts and Playwright trace/video/artifacts where applicable; attach artifact paths in closeout.

## Risk red lines
- Do not bypass V-TEC-53 approver requirement.
- Prototype naming red-line: translate any legacy prototype/domain labels `fa`/`FA5100`/Factory Article to canonical `fg`/FG, any `PR-code` wording to WIP/intermediate, and any `process_stage`/`process_code` to `manufacturing_operation_name`; do not introduce legacy field names in final code, labels, tests or schemas.
- PO/D365 cost imports must not silently overwrite approved supplier_specs or item cost_per_kg; require explicit review/audit for significant deviations.
- FG is canonical; FA is legacy alias only — do not introduce FA-* identifiers in new schemas, code, labels, tests.
- D365 is optional integration; never use D365 IDs as hard FKs — d365_item_id is TEXT soft reference only.
- Released BOM/factory_spec edits clone-on-write a new version; never mutate an approved/released row in place.
- Shared BOM SSOT is canonical — Technical, NPD, Planning, Production, Warehouse and Finance read the same bom_headers/lines/co_products tables.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim — translate to production shadcn primitives per `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md`.
- Do not use raw HTML <select> — use shadcn Select.
- Do not use inline styles — use Tailwind classes; conditional via cn()/cva().
- Do not import @radix-ui/* outside packages/ui (ESLint guard).

## Prototype parity
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/other-screens.jsx:761-820` (cost_history_screen) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Canonical anchor: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/technical/modals.jsx:518-537` (cost_rollup_recompute_modal) — see `_meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-technical.json` entry and `_meta/prototype-labels/translation-notes-technical.md` for shadcn translation guidance.
- Evidence policy: `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md` — closeout must include screenshot artifacts + Playwright trace/video where applicable, plus axe results or documented blocker.
